blaze

UNO

World Mini App

Designer

The most popular wallet on World Chain to swap tokens.

ORO

World Mini App

Designer

A daily token verified users can claim on World Chain, with bonuses for referrals.

How's the roads?

iOS App

Creator

A live traffic cam viewer for Kansas City, showing real-time road and weather conditions across the metro.

Holy Hues

iOS App

Creator

A pocket Bible that lets you style and share verses with custom colors, fonts, and backgrounds.

Party

Web App

Designer

A group chat with a group wallet that lets you crowdfund, launch tokens, and coordinate onchain.

Color Theme

Experiment

Creator

Interactive 3D color harmony viewer with real-time updates and orbiting shapes.

Marble Maker

Experiment

Creator

A customizable 3D marble generator with real-time shaders, randomization, lighting controls, and PNG export.

I collaborate with innovative companies to design and build creative digital experiences. At PartyDAO (2022–present), I've contributed to the design of party.app and World apps, shaping engaging and user-friendly products.

Previously, I was the founding designer at Showtime (2021–2022), leading the product design direction. In 2021, I also collaborated with WorkOS, creating compelling marketing graphics and visual materials.

From 2015–2017, I worked at Bitovi, delivering major web projects for brands including Lowe's and Levi's. Prior to this, between 2013–2017, I pursued experimental 3D projects as a freelance designer, including work in space and weather-related visualizations. Early in my career at Scribd (2010–2012), I focused on designing and enhancing their core website.
